title: Hot Chili Sauce (Làjiāo Jiàng)

ingredients.title: Main Base
items: 150 g dried red chilies (Sichuan facing-heaven + Thai bird’s eye mix)

instruction.title: Step 1: Prep the Chilies
steps: Break dried chilies and remove some seeds for controlled heat.
Soak in hot water for 20 minutes, then drain.
Blend into a coarse chili paste.

instruction.title: Step 2: Infuse the Oil
steps: Cook until fragrant, then remove aromatics from oil.

instruction.title: Step 3: Cook Chili Paste
steps: Carefully add chili paste into hot oil (it may splatter).
Stir continuously until oil turns deep red (5–7 min).

instruction.title: Step 4: Build Flavor
steps: Add doubanjiang and fermented black beans.
Stir in Shaoxing wine, soy sauce, sugar, salt, and Sichuan peppercorns.
Simmer on low heat for 10 minutes.

instruction.title: Step 5: Finish & Store
steps: Store in a clean glass jar covered with oil.
Rest for 24 hours for best flavor.

chefTips: Use enough oil to fully preserve and mellow the chili paste.
Pixian doubanjiang gives authentic Sichuan depth.
Flavor improves significantly after 1 day resting.
Do not burn aromatics during oil infusion.
